mapper.update: UPDATE user_reviews SET overall_rating = #{overallRating}, food_rating = #{foodRating}, price_rating = #{priceRating}, ambiance_rating = #{ambianceRating}, service_rating = #{serviceRating}, text = #{text}, photos = #{photos}::text, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_reviews WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId}
